title: 单线程 Agent Loop：为什么 Claude Code 不用 Swarm
context_sources_read: context/information_sources/从Claude Code源码看Anthropic的产品野心.md
context/information_sources/Claude Code 源码泄露全面剖析.md

key_findings.core_loop: query.ts while(true) loop - single-threaded, flat message history
key_findings.tool_concurrency: StreamingToolExecutor handles tool-level concurrency within single thread (read parallel, write serial)
key_findings.swarm_system: utils/swarm/ - opt-in multi-agent: InProcess (AsyncLocalStorage), Tmux, iTerm2 backends
key_findings.coordinator: coordinatorMode.ts - feature-flagged, transforms Claude into project manager with Agent/SendMessage/TaskStop only
key_findings.fork_agents: Lightweight sub-agents sharing prompt cache prefix for maximum cache hits
